title: Another Verilator Internal Error for shift by undef value
body:
---


Author Name: **Clifford Wolf** (@cliffordwolf)
Original Redmine Issue: 772 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2014-05-23
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

Verilator 06744b6 creates the following error:
```%Error: Internal Error: ../V3Number.cpp:521: toUInt with 4-state 32'bxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
```
     
```module issue_049(a, y);
  input [3:0] a;
  output [3:0] y;
  assign y = a << 1 <<< 0/0;
endmodule
```
